items.title: App Folders
items.description: Managed data folders are present and writable.

items.title: Project Storage
items.description: Managed project and export storage folders are available.

items.title: Python Packages
items.description: All required Python packages are available to the main app.

items.title: FFmpeg
items.description: FFmpeg is not configured yet. Install the managed Windows build automatically or locate ffmpeg.exe manually.

items.title: ffprobe
items.description: ffprobe is not configured yet. Install the managed Windows build automatically or locate ffprobe.exe manually.

items.title: WhisperX Model
items.description: WhisperX runtime is installed, but no managed transcription model has been downloaded yet. The app will ask which model size to install before the download starts.

items.title: Argos Translate
items.description: Argos Translate runtime is installed, but no offline language pairs are installed yet.
items.details: Language packages are downloaded only for the source and target languages you choose.

items.title: Piper Runtime
items.description: The managed Piper executable is not installed yet. Install it once for local speech synthesis.

items.title: Piper Voices
items.description: No Piper voice is installed yet. Install at least one voice before generating dubbed speech.

items.title: SpeechBrain Speaker Grouping
items.description: SpeechBrain runtime is installed, but the local ECAPA asset has not been prepared yet.
items.details: The app can fetch the ECAPA asset later when per-speaker voice mode needs it.

items.title: audEERING Speaker Gender
items.description: The audEERING age/gender model is not downloaded yet. Install it for better male/female speaker matching.
items.details: The app can also prepare it automatically when a job uses gender-aware speaker matching.
